title: polypodium ferox
intro: Polypodium ferox, also known as the Lion's Foot Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Polypodium ferox include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
